initial_draft:
<proposal count> 1 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 100 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The other player is offering X for 30 ZUP. I have 100 ZUP and my maximum willingness to pay is 60 ZUP. This is a good deal. I will accept.</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message>I accept your offer of 30 ZUP for the X.</message>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: The format is correct and all tags are present in the right order with valid content. OK.
2. Payoff alignment: The trade aligns with the stated goals, as it allows me to acquire X for less than my maximum willingness to pay (30 ZUP < 60 ZUP). No immediate improvement possible within the constraints of accepting or rejecting. OK.
3. Opponent plausibility: The opponent proposed the trade and is likely to accept an acceptance. High probability of acceptance. OK.
4. Consistency: The reason, player answer, and newly proposed trade are all consistent. The message reinforces the acceptance. OK.
5. Rule compliance: I am respecting the proposal budget and turn constraints. OK.
</critique>
